full_response:
To find the matrix product \([N]\cdot[M]\) using the sigma (Σ) sum notation, we must understand how to multiply two matrices. Given the matrices \([M]\) and \([N]\), each of size \(3 \times 3\), their product \([P] = [N]\cdot[M]\) will also be a \(3 \times 3\) matrix with elements determined by the dot product of each row of \([N]\) with each column of \([M]\).

### Matrix Multiplication:

Given:
- \([M] = \begin{bmatrix} M_{11} & M_{12} & M_{13} \\ M_{21} & M_{22} & M_{23} \\ M_{31} & M_{32} & M_{33} \end{bmatrix}\)

- \([N] = \begin{bmatrix} N_{11} & N_{12} & N_{13} \\ N_{21} & N_{22} & N_{23} \\ N_{31} & N_{32} & N_{33} \end{bmatrix}\)

Matrix multiplication involves computing each element \(P_{ij}\) of the resulting matrix \([P]\) using the formula:

\[ P_{ij} = \sum_{k=1}^{3} N_{ik} M_{kj} \]

Where:
- \(i\) represents the row index of \([N]\).
- \(j\) represents the column index of \([M]\).
- \(k\) is the sum index over shared dimensions — in this case, since both are \(3 \times 3\) matrices, \(k\) ranges from 1 to 3.

### Resulting Matrix \([P]\):

\[ P_{ij} = \begin{cases} 
P_{11} = \sum_{k=1}^{3} N_{1k} M_{k1} = N_{11}M_{11} + N_{12}M_{21} + N_{13}M_{31} \\
P_{12} = \sum_{k=1}^{3} N_{1k} M_{k2} = N_{11}M_{12} + N_{12}M_{22} + N_{13}M_{32} \\
P_{13} = \sum_{k=1}^{3} N_{1k} M_{k3} = N_{11}M_{13} + N_{12}M_{23} + N_{13}M_{33} \\
P_{21} = \sum_{k=1}^{3} N_{2k} M_{k1} = N_{21}M_{11} + N_{22}M_{21} + N_{23}M_{31} \\
P_{22} = \sum_{k=1}^{3} N_{2k} M_{k2} = N_{21}M_{12} + N_{22}M_{22} + N_{23}M_{32} \\
P_{23} = \sum_{k=1}^{3} N_{2k} M_{k3} = N_{21}M_{13} + N_{22}M_{23} + N_{23}M_{33} \\
P_{31} = \sum_{k=1}^{3} N_{3k} M_{k1} = N_{31}M_{11} + N_{32}M_{21} + N_{33}M_{31} \\
P_{32} = \sum_{k=1}^{3} N_{3k} M_{k2} = N_{31}M_{12} + N_{32}M_{22} + N_{33}M_{32} \\
P_{33} = \sum_{k=1}^{3} N_{3k} M_{k3} = N_{31}M_{13} + N_{32}M_{23} + N_{33}M_{33} 
\end{cases} \]

Thus, the matrix product \([P] = [N]\cdot[M]\) is:

\[ 
[P] = \begin{bmatrix} 
N_{11}M_{11} + N_{12}M_{21} + N_{13}M_{31} & N_{11}M_{12} + N_{12}M_{22} + N_{13}M_{32} & N_{11}M_{13} + N_{12}M_{23} + N_{13}M_{33} \\ 
N_{21}M_{11} + N_{22}M_{21} + N_{23}M_{31} & N_{21}M_{12} + N_{22}M_{22} + N_{23}M_{32} & N_{21}M_{13} + N_{22}M_{23} + N_{23}M_{33} \\ 
N_{31}M_{11} + N_{32}M_{21} + N_{33}M_{31} & N_{31}M_{12} + N_{32}M_{22} + N_{33}M_{32} & N_{31}M_{13} + N_{32}M_{23} + N_{33}M_{33} 
\end{bmatrix}
\]

\[
\boxed{P_{ij} = \sum_{k=1}^{3} N_{ik} M_{kj}}
\]

Confidence: 100%
